title: Mega Breaker Tools
description: This mod add A LOT a tools and very powerful, like pickaxe breaking areas 7x7 and more the same goes to axes, hoes and shovels, you can literely destroy your world, have fun.
body:
This mod introduces a collection of 3D powerful new tools, designed to revolutionize resource gathering and farming.



# Key Features: Area-of-Effect Efficiency
## 2D Area Breaking

The core feature is the ability to break blocks, till soil, harvest crops, and strip wood in a large Area-of-Effect (AoE).

The standard tools operate in a 2D area ranging from 3x3 blocks and much more.



## 3D Area Breaking

Some of the strongest tools are capable of 3-Dimensional breaking in a 3x3x3 cube, perfect for rapid mining and excavation.



## Single Block Mode

For moments when you only need to break a single block, the mod includes a special mode that allows the tools to function as standard single-block tools, giving the player complete control.
